data.title: Cohu Inc reported Q4 earnings miss with 15 cents loss vs. 6 cents estimates. Q4 sales beat estimates of $122.092M at $122.230M. Q1 sales estimated between $115M-$129M vs. $120.136M consensus.
data.description: Cohu Inc (NASDAQ: COHU) announced disappointing fourth-quarter adjusted EPS results with a reported loss of 15 cents per share, falling short of the expected 6 cents per share. Despite this, the company managed to exceed revenue projections, recording quarterly sales of $122.23 million compared to an estimated $122.092 million. Looking ahead, Cohu anticipates first-quarter sales ranging from $115 million to $129 million, while analysts had forecasted $120.136 million. The company highlighted its strong performance in Q4, generating $122 million in revenue, a 30% increase year-over-year. This growth was attributed to improved market conditions, with test cell utilization rising to 76% in December. Additionally, recurring revenue in the fourth quarter rose by 25% year-over-year due to high demand for services, interface solutions, and handler-related products. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: 75% of enterprise intrusions involve stolen credentials. Companies are adapting to the threat.
data.description: Press release from QSE - Quantum Secure Encryption Corp. based in Vancouver, BC, dated February 13, 2026, revealed that a commentary by Equity Insider News highlighted a concerning trend. Reports indicate that approximately 75% of enterprise intrusions now occur due to compromised identity credentials, rather than the traditional vulnerability exploits. This shift emphasizes the importance of robust encryption and security measures to protect organizations from cyber threats.

data.title: 24-year-old from Connecticut faces 375 years for losing almost $1 million of investors' funds in crypto scam. Charged with 21 counts.
data.description: A 24-year-old individual is confronted with 21 criminal charges due to the mishandling of customer funds valued at almost $1 million. Prosecutors allege that the funds, which were purportedly meant to be invested in cryptocurrency, were never actually used for this purpose.

data.title: Hackers from North Korea, Iran, and Russia utilizing AI tools, warns Google's report on AI Threat Tracker.
data.description: The latest findings from Google's AI Threat Tracker reveal that hackers from North Korea, Iran, and Russia are leveraging artificial intelligence to accelerate their offensive maneuvers. This report sheds light on the utilization of advanced technologies by cybercriminals, emphasizing the concerning trend observed in the cyber landscape. The data highlights a significant uptick in the adoption of AI by threat actors, underscoring the need for heightened vigilance and robust cybersecurity measures to counter these evolving threats effectively.

data.title: Festi hf. sells FESTI 050331 bond series worth ISK 4,200,000,000 at 3.95% yield under ISK 8,000,000,000 programme.
data.description: Today, Festi hf. finalized the sale of a new bond series, FESTI 050331, part of the Company’s ISK 8,000,000,000 issuance programme. The index-linked bonds have a nominal value of ISK 4,200,000,000 and were sold with a yield of 3.95%.

data.title: The Victory Bancorp, Inc. reported strong Q4 earnings for 2025, showcasing balance sheet strength, solid performance, and high asset quality.
data.description: In LIMERICK, Pennsylvania, on February 13, 2026, The Victory Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: VTYB) revealed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The results underscored the firm's robust balance sheet, impressive earnings, and outstanding asset quality.

data.title: UPDATE: UK CHM revises recommendations on Valneva SE's single-dose chikungunya vaccine, IXCHIQ®, for use in UK.
data.description: Valneva SE, a specialized vaccine company, revealed today in Lyon, France, that the UK's Commission on Human Medicines (CHM) has modified its guidelines for the usage of the Company's one-shot chikungunya vaccine, IXCHIQ®. The updated recommendations come after a thorough evaluation of the vaccine's advantages and potential risks. Valneva SE is listed on Nasdaq as VALN and on Euronext Paris as VLA.

data.title: Packaging industry trends focus on AI, automation, sustainability - manufacturers investing in smarter equipment - PMMI Report.
data.description: A recent event, PACK EXPO East held in Herndon, VA on February 13, 2026, showcased the latest advancements in the manufacturing industry. Packaging and processing companies are increasingly focusing on incorporating advanced technology and sustainable practices due to labor shortages. This trend is evident through the introduction of new equipment and digital tools at the expo. Manufacturers are prioritizing smarter machinery, automation, and eco-friendly solutions to cater to the changing dynamics of the sector. The event highlighted the significant investments being made in these areas, indicating a shift towards a more modern and efficient manufacturing landscape.

data.title: Coinbase suffers $667M loss as Bitcoin drops, Q1 outlook grim but hope remains in the ecosystem.
data.description: Although the last quarter was challenging and the forecast for the first quarter is bleak, there are numerous positive indicators within the Coinbase network.

data.title: Airbnb stock surges as Q4 revenue exceeds estimates with $2.78 billion, gross booking value hits $20.4 billion. Deutsche Bank upgrades rating to buy.
data.description: Airbnb Inc (NASDAQ: ABNB) stock is experiencing a surge, attributed to a notable analyst upgrade following a strong fourth-quarter performance. Despite earnings of 56 cents per share missing expectations of 65 cents, revenue exceeded forecasts at $2.78 billion compared to $2.72 billion. The Gross booking value also rose to $20.4 billion, representing a 13% increase from the previous year. Nights and experiences booked increased by 10% to 121.9 million, indicating steady demand despite the slight earnings miss. The upbeat quarter-one guidance is further fueling the stock's exceptional strength. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: NextEra Energy declares $0.6232 quarterly dividend, up by 10% from last year's dividend.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida, on February 13, 2026, the board of directors of NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) announced a regular quarterly common stock dividend of $0.6232 per share. This marks a substantial 10% increase compared to the dividend paid during the same quarter last year. The decision to raise the dividend aligns with the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders and reflects its strong financial performance.

data.title: Opportune LLP acquires Pickering Energy Partners' Consulting & Advocacy Practice in Houston.
data.description: In Houston, Opportune LLP recently completed the acquisition of the Consulting & Advocacy Practice division of Pickering Energy Partners LP. This strategic move consolidates Opportune LLP's position in the market and expands their service offerings. The acquisition involves a significant number of staff members transitioning to Opportune LLP, significantly enlarging their team. This acquisition is part of Opportune LLP's growth strategy and commitment to providing comprehensive solutions to their clients.
